name: Prove
description: Prove is a digital identity platform using phone-number intelligence, possession checks and Prove Pre-Fill to verify and authenticate users, cutting fraud and friction in onboarding for banks and fintechs.

seo.title: Prove — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Prove: Prove is a digital identity platform using phone-number intelligence, possession checks and Prove Pre-Fill to verify and authenticate users, cutting frau

when_to_use: Phone-number intelligence for frictionless KYC onboarding
Prove Pre-Fill API for auto-populating identity fields
SIM swap detection for account takeover prevention
Phone possession check for step-up authentication flows
Identity verification reducing friction for bank onboarding

pros: Phone-possession signals cut SIM swap fraud
Pre-Fill autofills KYC forms from phone data
Reduces onboarding friction for US consumers
Strong bank and fintech customer base
cons: Enterprise procurement, slow to start with
review.verdict: Phone-centric identity for US fintech that genuinely cuts friction; less compelling outside the US.
review.best_for: US banks and fintechs using phone possession to reduce fraud and autofill KYC fields
review.not_for: Global or privacy-minimal products that cannot rely on US carrier data for verification

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
